name: WiFi SSID Monitor
_comment: Added -U to ensure it upgrades if a cached version is old
postCreateCommand: apk update && apk add nodejs npm bash libc6-compat ncurses coreutils && pip install -r .validate/requirements_test.txt && npm install -g @google/gemini-cli && sed -i '1s|.*|#!/usr/bin/node|' /usr/local/lib/node_modules/@google/gemini-cli/bin/gemini.js && ln -sf /usr/local/lib/node_modules/@google/gemini-cli/bin/gemini.js /usr/local/bin/gemini

settings._comment: This helps VS Code find your imports correctly
